what: FAB mascot rig layers (robot-head.png, robot-eyes.png, robot-antenna.png)
pipeline: base robot head generated with tools/gen_assets.ts (gpt-image-1.5, transparent) -> segmented into 3 registered transparent layers by /tmp/robot-gen/segment.mjs (color-key the magenta eyes, split the antenna at the head's top edge, dark-fill the lenses behind the eyes) -> animated as parts by GSAP in fab-robot.tsx

layers.robot-head.png: head + glasses with dark (unlit) lenses, static mouth, no antenna
layers.robot-eyes.png: magenta eye glow only; blink = scaleY, glance = translateX
layers.robot-antenna.png: antenna stalk + tip; sway = rotate about its base
